greeting: Hello, how can I help you today?
disclaimer: This information is for guidance only. Always consult your pharmacist or GP for medical advice.
prescription_prompt: Please photograph or type your prescription details.
booking_confirmed: Your appointment has been confirmed for {datetime}.
error_generic: Something went wrong. Please try again or call NHS 111.
triage_urgent: Please contact NHS 111 or visit your nearest Urgent Treatment Centre.
triage_routine: Book a routine appointment with your GP.
triage_self_care: This can likely be managed at home. Speak to a pharmacist if symptoms worsen.
